# лҰ¬н—Ҳм„Ө к°Җмқҙл“ң & кІҖмҰқ ліҙкі м„ң

## Part 1: лҰ¬н—Ҳм„Ө к°Җмқҙл“ң

### лҰ¬н—Ҳм„Ө кі„нҡҚ
| лӢЁкі„ | мӢңм җ | лӘ©н‘ң | нҷңлҸҷ | мҶҢмҡ”мӢңк°„ |
|------|------|------|------|---------|
| 1м°Ё | D-7 | лӮҙмҡ© мҲҷм§Җ | лҢҖліё мқҪкё° + нӮӨнҸ¬мқёнҠё м•”кё° | 1мӢңк°„ |
| 2м°Ё | D-5 | м „лӢ¬л Ҙ | м„ңм„ң л§җн•ҳкё° + м ңмҠӨмІҳ м—°мҠө | 1мӢңк°„ |
| 3м°Ё | D-3 | мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ | м „мІҙ лҰ¬н—Ҳм„Ө + Q&A м—°мҠө | 2мӢңк°„ |
| 4м°Ё | D-1 | мөңмў… м җкІҖ | н•өмӢ¬ нҸ¬мқёнҠёл§Ң лҰ¬л·° | 30л¶„ |

### м „лӢ¬л Ҙ к°Җмқҙл“ң

#### мҶҚлҸ„ & лҰ¬л“¬
- **кё°ліё мҶҚлҸ„**: л¶„лӢ№ м•Ҫ 250лӢЁм–ҙ (н•ңкөӯм–ҙ кё°мӨҖ)
- **к°•мЎ° кө¬к°„**: [мҶҚлҸ„лҘј лҠҰм¶”кі  лҳҗл°•лҳҗл°• л§җн•  л¶Җл¶„]
- **м№Ёл¬ө нҷңмҡ©**: [нҡЁкіјм Ғ м№Ёл¬ө мң„м№ҳ вҖ” 2~3мҙҲ]

#### м ңмҠӨмІҳ & мӢңм„ 
- **к°ңл°©нҳ• м ңмҠӨмІҳ**: н•өмӢ¬ нҸ¬мқёнҠём—җм„ң мҶҗл°”лӢҘмқ„ мІӯмӨ‘м—җкІҢ
- **мӢңм„  л¶„л°°**: мўҢвҶ’мӨ‘вҶ’мҡ° 6мҙҲ лӢЁмң„ мҲңнҷҳ
- **мқҙлҸҷ**: нҸ¬мқёнҠё м „нҷҳ мӢң л¬ҙлҢҖ мқҙлҸҷмңјлЎң мӢңк°Ғм Ғ ліҖнҷ”

#### мқҢм„ұ
- **к°•мЎ° лӢЁм–ҙ**: [лҢҖліём—җм„ң ліјл“ң мІҳлҰ¬лҗң лӢЁм–ҙлҘј к°•н•ҳкІҢ]
- **нҶӨ ліҖнҷ”**: [к°җм • кө¬к°„м—җм„ң нҶӨ лӮ®м¶”кё°/лҶ’мқҙкё°]

### кёҙмһҘ кҙҖлҰ¬
- **л°ңн‘ң 30л¶„ м „**: [4-7-8 нҳёнқЎлІ•] 4мҙҲ л“Өмқҙмү¬кі -7мҙҲ мң м§Җ-8мҙҲ лӮҙмү¬кё°
- **лҢҖкё° мӨ‘**: нҢҢмӣҢ нҸ¬мҰҲ 2л¶„ (м–‘мҶҗ н—ҲлҰ¬, м–ҙк№Ё нҺҙкё°)
- **л°ңн‘ң мӢңмһ‘ м§Ғнӣ„**: мІ« л¬ёмһҘл§Ң мҷ„лІҪнһҲ м•”кё° вҶ’ м„ұкіөм Ғ мӢңмһ‘мқҙ мһҗмӢ к°җ л¶Җм—¬
- **л§җ лҚ”л“¬м—Ҳмқ„ л•Ң**: мһ мӢң л©Ҳм¶”кі  л¬ј н•ң лӘЁкёҲ вҶ’ мһҗм—°мҠӨлҹҪкІҢ мһ¬к°ң

### мӢӨм „ мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ мІҙнҒ¬лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё
- [ ] нғҖмқҙлЁё мјңкі  м „мІҙ нҶө лҰ¬н—Ҳм„Ө мҷ„лЈҢ
- [ ] мөңмҶҢ 3лӘ…м—җкІҢ мҳҲн–ү л°ңн‘ң нӣ„ н”јл“ңл°ұ мҲҳл ҙ
- [ ] Q&A лЎӨн”Ңл Ҳмқҙ (лҸ„м „м Ғ м§Ҳл¬ё нҸ¬н•Ё) мҷ„лЈҢ
- [ ] мһҘл№„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (л§ҲмқҙнҒ¬/н”„лЎңм қн„°/нҒҙлҰ¬м»Ө) мҷ„лЈҢ
- [ ] л°ұм—… н”Ңлһң нҷ•мқё (мҠ¬лқјмқҙл“ң л¶Ҳк°Җ мӢң лҢҖмқ‘)

### л°ңн‘ң лӢ№мқј мІҙнҒ¬лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё
- [ ] лҢҖліё/л…ёнҠё м№ҙл“ң мӨҖл№„
- [ ] мһҘл№„ мөңмў… н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (л°ңн‘ң 30л¶„ м „)
- [ ] л¬јлі‘ мӨҖл№„
- [ ] нҳёнқЎ мҡҙлҸҷ мҷ„лЈҢ
- [ ] мІ« л¬ёмһҘ мөңмў… нҷ•мқё

---

# Public Speaking Harness

 comprehensive speechdocumentвҶ’presentationversusвҶ’debatepreparationfromвҶ’Q&AexpectedanswerвҶ’rehearsalguide A harness where an agent team collaborates to produce deliverables.

## structure

```
.claude/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ agents/
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ audience-analyst.md вҖ” audience analysis (target audience, context, expected)
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ speech-writer.md вҖ” speech/presentation work (speechdocument, presentationversus)
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ debate-preparer.md вҖ” debate preparation expert (, counterargument, gapdocument)
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ qa-strategist.md вҖ” Q&A strategy (expected question, answer strategy)
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ rehearsal-coach.md вҖ” rehearsal value and cross-verification (delivercapability, consistency)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ skills/
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ public-speaking/
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skill.md вҖ” Orchestrator (team , workflow, error handling)
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ rhetoric-patterns/
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skill.md вҖ” numbercompany pattern library (speech-writer extension)
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ audience-engagement/
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skill.md вҖ” audience strategy (audience-analyst extension)
в””в”Җв”Җ CLAUDE.md вҖ” file
```

## usage

`/public-speaking` skill , "speechdocument " specialistannual request.

## deliverable

- `00_input.md` вҖ” user input organization
- `01_audience_analysis.md` вҖ” audience analysis report
- `02_speech_script.md` вҖ” speechdocument/presentation versus
- `03_debate_prep.md` вҖ” debate preparationfrom

# Public Speaking вҖ” comprehensive pipeline

 audienceanalysisвҶ’speechdocumentвҶ’debatepreparationвҶ’Q&AвҶ’rehearsalguide An agent team collaborates to generate all deliverables at once.

## execution mode

**agent team** вҖ” 5 agents communicate directly via SendMessage and cross-verify each other's work.

## agent composition

| agent | file | role | type |
|---------|------|------|------|
| audience-analyst | `.claude/agents/audience-analyst.md` | audience file, emotion , message | general-purpose |
| speech-writer | `.claude/agents/speech-writer.md` | speechdocument/presentation versus, numbercompany, stage degreewhen | general-purpose |
| debate-preparer | `.claude/agents/debate-preparer.md` | , counterargument , gapdocument | general-purpose |
| qa-strategist | `.claude/agents/qa-strategist.md` | expected question, answer strategy, Q&A operations | general-purpose |
| rehearsal-coach | `.claude/agents/rehearsal-coach.md` | rehearsal plan, delivercapability, cross-verification | general-purpose |

## workflow

### Phase 1: preparation (Orchestrator directly perform)

1. Extract from user input:
 - **presentation type**: basisspeech/presentation/value/debate/interviewpresentation
 - **week**: presentation week and core message
 - **audience**: target audience nature
 - **time**: to do time
 - **context**: eventpeople, situation, by requirements
 - **existing material** (optional): before presentation material, , KRW
2. `_workspace/` Create the directory at the project root
3. Organize input and save to `_workspace/00_input.md`
4. If existing files are provided, copy them to `_workspace/`and skip the corresponding Phase
5. Determine the **execution mode** based on the scope of the request

### Phase 2: team composition and execution

| order | task | responsible | dependency | deliverable |
|------|------|------|------|--------|
| 1 | audience analysis | analyst | None | `_workspace/01_audience_analysis.md` |
| 2 | speechdocument writing | writer | task 1 | `_workspace/02_speech_script.md` |
| 3a | debate preparation | preparer | task 1, 2 | `_workspace/03_debate_prep.md` |
| 3b | Q&A strategy | strategist | task 1, 2 | `_workspace/04_qa_playbook.md` |
| 4 | rehearsal guide and verify | coach | task 3a, 3b | `_workspace/05_rehearsal_guide.md` |

task 3a(debate) and 3b(Q&A) ** execution**. task 1, 2 dependency.

**teamKRW between flow:**
- analyst complete вҶ’ writerto audience file+emotion + deliver, preparerto audience also deliver, strategistto question direction deliver
- writer complete вҶ’ preparerto core point+approx. point deliver, strategistto question point deliver
- preparer complete вҶ’ strategistto counterargument list 
- coach all deliverable cross-verification. рҹ”ҙ required revision findings when Request revision from the relevant agent -> rework -> re-verify (up to 2 rounds)

### Phase 3: integration and final deliverable

1. `_workspace/` Verify all files in the directory
2. verify reportConfirm that all critical revisions from the review report have been addressed
3. Report the final summary to the user:
 - audience analysis вҖ” `01_audience_analysis.md`
 - speechdocument/presentation versus вҖ” `02_speech_script.md`
 - debate preparationfrom вҖ” `03_debate_prep.md`
 - Q&A вҖ” `04_qa_playbook.md`
 - rehearsal guide вҖ” `05_rehearsal_guide.md`

## task scaleby mode

| user request pattern | execution mode | deploy agent |
|----------------|----------|-------------|
| "presentation preparationplease do", "value overall preparation" | **Full pipeline** | 5people beforeKRW |
| "speechdocument only " | **speech mode** | analyst + writer + coach |
| " presentation material Q&A preparationplease do" (material provide) | **Q&A mode** | strategist + coach |
| "debate preparationplease do" | **debate mode** | analyst + preparer + coach |
| "rehearsal guide" (versus provide) | **rehearsal mode** | coach |

**existing file utilization**: user presentation material, versus etc. provide applicable stage case.

## data deliver protocol

| strategy | method | also |
|------|------|------|
| File-based | `_workspace/` | Store and share major deliverables |
| Message-based | SendMessage | Real-time key information transfer, revision requests |

File naming convention: `{}_{agent}_{deliverable}.{extensionspecialist}`

## error handling

| error type | strategy |
|----------|------|
| audience information None | event typefrom general audience file , "estimation based" specify |
| presentation type people | presentation basicas applied |
| web search failure | user provide information and day degree based task |
| agent failure | Retry once -> proceed without that deliverable |
| verifyfrom рҹ”ҙ findings | Request revision from the relevant agent -> rework -> re-verify (up to 2 rounds) |
| debate needed | debate preparation , Q&A during |

## test scenario

### flow
**Prompt**: "next week technical from 'AI whenversus development' week 30minute basisspeech . audience developmentspecialist 500people."
**expected result**:
- audience analysis: developmentspecialist segment(week/when/), expected, , emotion 
- speechdocument: 30minute basisspeech versus + stage degreewhen + numbercompany technique
- debate preparation: AI versus etc. expected counterargument + 
- Q&A: 15items or more expected question + answer 
- rehearsal: D-7department schedule + delivercapability guide + consistency matrix confirm

### existing material utilization flow
**Prompt**: " presentation versusas Q&A preparation rehearsal guide create it" + versus file provide
**expected result**:
- audience analysis, speechdocument writing case
- versus `_workspace/02_speech_script.md` company
- strategist + coach deploy

### error flow
**Prompt**: "presentation preparationplease do, week un-"
**expected result**:
- week people userto presentation week/context confirm question
- answer basedas task progress
- verify report "week after final review needed" specify

# Rhetoric Patterns вҖ” numbercompany pattern library

speech-writer / debate-preparer agent persuasioncapability numbercompany pattern.

## speech structure pattern

### pattern 1: Monroe's Motivated Sequence

| stage | purpose | technique |
|------|------|------|
| 1. Attention (week) | during | statistics, story, question |
| 2. Need (needed) | problem person | currentactual when, data present |
| 3. Satisfaction  | present | specific approach, quality description |
| 4. Visualization (visualization) | un- | nature/failure scenario |
| 5. Action (action) | action also | specific , CTA |

**quality**: persuasion/proposal presentation, investment value, speech

### pattern 2: PREP (Point-Reason-Example-Point)

```
Point: " complete "
Reason: "current un- cost annualbetween 30% increaseand basis whendocument"
Example: "competitor A after person cost 40% reduction"
Point: "according tofrom 3minutebasisto beforeexchange complete "
```

**quality**: , Q&A answer, meeting 

### pattern 3: problem--profit (PSB)

```
Problem: current [problem] because [departmentquality result] occurrenceand 
Solution: [proposal] through problem to do number 
Benefit: through [specific profit] number 
```

### pattern 4: story 

```
1. day (situation setting)
2. before (etc./problem)
3. beforeexchangepoint (insight/decision)
4. (action/result)
5. (message)
```
